Monotonic Stack.trigger: Find Next Greater/Smaller Element, Largest Rectangle in Histogram, Trapping Rain Water

Binary Search (Answer).trigger: Maximize minimum, minimize maximum, searching in a monotonic answer space
Binary Search (Answer).complexity: Time: O(N log R) | Space: O(1)

Union-Find (DSU).trigger: Dynamic connectivity, cycle detection in undirected graphs, group/set union and find

Digit DP.trigger: Count numbers in range [L, R] satisfying specific digit-based rules (e.g., no digit 4)

Segment Tree.trigger: Dynamic range modification and range queries (Sum/Max/Min)
